entry.title: LMS Search for Library-No libraries were found with the provided search criteria.
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a learning admin who created an Item and try to add that Item to their Library that they have access, but received a message "No libraries were found with the provided search criteria" when search for the library to add to the Item.  Also, when searching for the specific Library still no results.  I've checked the permission and the role assigned  to the Admin does have permission to do all these tasks.

Have anyone have this same issue? and what is the resolution if any.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Tam

entry.title: SAP S4 Trial Balance App Unpivot
entry.content: Is there a way to unpivot the export in the Trial Balance App?  For example, show Company Code in every row of data.  This is to facilitate upload to a 3rd Party consolidation tool

entry.title: Re: Roadmap Viewer Task - Not Authorized to view this res...
entry.content: I don't have the answer, but I have the same problem.  I am wondering, that nobody helps.

entry.title: Re: Calendar View functionality is missing on New integra...
entry.content: Hi, I could verify that there is currently an Enhancement Request for this feature: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/325775/?section=sectionDetails. It has been Acknowledged already, and highly voted requests are usually implemented in the product roadmap. Please follow the enhancement request if you would like to receive information on it

entry.title: Re: Call an OData Web API Service externally
entry.content:
Thank you for the response.

You mean, I need to replace abap-web.us10.hana.ondemand.com with abap.us10.hana.ondemand.com in API URL?

entry.title: Re: Unable to replace backslash using replaceall function...
entry.content:
Hi rajav17,

The replaceAll() String function uses a regular expression as first argument and the "\" is one of the special characters used in regex to escape special characters.

So try to use this construct.

String source = 'This String contains\backslash replace it with SPACE.';
String target = source.replaceAll("/\\/", " ");
print target;

 It's important to assign the return value of replaceAll() to either the source String or a new String object.

Hope this helps!

cu,
Mathias

entry.title: Re: Is SAP Learning Hub available to individuals?
entry.content:
Hi, Lorie,

Unfortunately, this is gated material available to registered users from SAP customers as part of a maintenance contract with SAP.  

See: 

SAP Enterprise Support Academy FAQ > Who can get access to SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support and what does it cost?

Access to the support edition is part of the following maintenance agreements: SAP Enterprise Support, SAP Enterprise Support, Cloud Edition, or SAP Product Support for Large Enterprises (PSLE). 

Best regards,
Paula

entry.title: Calculate Salary % in Advance Formulas Step in DataAction
entry.content:
Hello Team – I have a requirement to calculate "Salary %" as % of days an employee has spent in their 1st or last month of their employment.

For example, In working forecast, if an employee’s last day of the employment is 26th June 2025, I want their salary to be calculated as Total Salary * ( Last Working Day / No. of Days in the month ) è Total Salary *  ( 26 / 30 )  = Total Salary * ( 0.86 )

Logic in Advanced Formulas Step goes like below…

FOREACH.BOOKED [d/TIME] --> I have member set restricted for 18 months (forecast period)

// Derive # of days in Termination month

@DaysInMnth = DAYSINMONTH([d/HRPOSITION].[p/PLAN_TERM])

// Derive Day of the month

@NoOfDays = DAY([d/HRPOSITION].[p/PLAN_TERM])

// Calculate Salary Percentage as Day of Month over No.OfDays

@Salary = @NoOfDays / @DaysInMnth

ENDFOR

I used the variable, @Salary (defined as FLOAT) in the formula to assign it to the measure, SALARY and read it again to calculate the actual salary.

It works fine when I have only one employee with termination date (For ex: 2026-06-26) in the middle of a month.

But as soon as it finds more than one employee, it is taking average value instead of taking it from that employee’s termination date. When I tried to trace the record, it shows both the records in Combined Scope. Below screenshot is for two employees one with termination date as 2026-06-26 and the other with termination date as 2026-06-18

I have the termination date at model level as well. When I use, it considers the combined scope for the month and calculates number of days in month as 961, No of Days as 496 and salary as 0.51 (For example, TIME Dimension – 202510)

Any help here is greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

Phani

entry.title: Business Meets Football: Insights from an Inspiring Discussion
entry.content:
On February 16, 2025, SAP hosted the Networking Female Leader Event at the FCB Campus in Munich – a powerful initiative by SAP Marketing, SAPBWNMunich, and SAP Women in Tech, highlighting leadership, teamwork, and diversity.

One of the most exciting moments was the panel discussion "What Do Football and Business Have in Common?", where I had the pleasure of joining Bianca “Jay” Rech (FC Bayern) and Michaela Schulz to explore the similarities between team dynamics in sports and successful collaboration in business. The discussion made it clear that team spirit, strategy, and leadership are crucial both on the field and in the corporate world.

Another highlight was the opportunity to exchange ideas with inspiring experts:
⚽ Maša Schmidt shared valuable insights on leadership and growth.
⚽ Tatiana Voytsenko introduced Personalized Fan Engagement in Real Time, offering an innovative take on marketing strategies.

Beyond these thought-provoking conversations, the event provided a unique networking experience in a relaxed atmosphere – topped off with an exclusive meet & greet with FC Bayern Munich players.

My 3 Key Takeaways:

  1. Success is a team effort – In both football and business, clear roles, trust, and communication are the foundation of winning strategies. No one succeeds alone.
  2. Mental strength is a game-changer – High performers in sports and business need resilience and the ability to make the right decisions under pressure.
  3. Diversity drives performance – Different perspectives lead to stronger strategies and more innovative solutions – whether on the pitch or in the boardroom.

What parallels do you see between sports and business? How have teamwork and leadership shaped your success? Let’s discuss! 

#SAPWomenInTech #SAPBWN #SAP

entry.title: Time entry for subordinates
entry.content:
I have the same question as Time entry for others , which boils down to "Can you enter time for other employees". The answer in 2014 was no, you need to use MSS. With the addition of 10 years of Fiori development, is the case still that this is only available with MSS?
We would like to have this capability available from a mobile friendly Fiori UI for our users.

entry.title: Is SAP DATA SERVICES able to query a web rest API with OAuth 2.0 authentication and CSRF token ?
entry.content:
Is SAP DATA SERVICES able to query a web rest API with OAuth 2.0 authentication and CSRF token ?

Some of SAP Analytics Cloud  API like /dataimport need OAuth 2.0 (client credentials) authentication and also a CSRF token. 

We currently don't see how to get the necessary CSRF token in SAP Data Services and use it in each query sent to SAC API.

Does someone have an idea ? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Update Employee Type in Learning
entry.content: Hello. I am trying to change/update a user's record to remove Contractor (CTR) from the Employee Type field. This was done in error after merging two accounts together (formally a contractor, but hired on as an employee so the training records needed to be merged). Previously I used the Finance tab to change this, but I understand this workaround no longer works. Has anyone found a solution on how to correct this field?

entry.title: Enabling Auto Provisioning GRC AC Workflow
entry.content:
Hello,

I have 3 default roles all users should get, and they should not require approval to be provisioned. I would like to enable auto provisioning for roles without role owners, but then that opens up a risk of roles being assigned that are outside of our design (SAP standard delivered roles, etc). that have no role owner.

Is there any setup up where I can avoid this and still accomplish what I am looking to do.

entry.title: Re: SAP Screen Personas 3.0 SP18 Flavor freezes
entry.content: Check whether you see any console error when the flavor freezes. Use the browser's Developer Tools for this when processing your steps.

Sanan Afridi

entry.title: Re: Personas Script for certain RF Screen
entry.content: Perhaps you could query the current screen content in your onLoad script and verify the presence of a certain control to decide what logic do you want to run in this event?

entry.title: S4 Embedded EWM - Usage decision with Sample Qty
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are implementing S4 2023 embedded EWM with QM integration.

We have process to send the sample Qty to external labs after GR and Inspection Lot created. We used to update the sample qty to blocked stock and SLOC as external lab in Inspection Lot stock tab and post it.

We have a track on where the sample inventory exists. Once we received the test results from external labs we record the results and complete UD with remaining qty (ex: unrestricted). The sample qty is in blocked stock will be consumed with 335 mvt-Goods issues to sample from blocked stock.

After EWM integration, I don't see Inspection lot stock tab in the UD screen. This is expected since stock control will be in EWM.

In S4 system will not allow to move partial qty from inspection lot from one SLOC to another. QAC2 will help to move the whole qty.

Could you please shed some lights how to address this case? Appreciate your inputs.

Regards,

Senthil

entry.title: Script to extract measure values and loop through them on initialization of page in SAC
entry.content:
Can anyone show me how to code a custom script in SAC optimized design story (on initialization of page) to load the measure values in a table into a variable and then loop through the measure values to check for a condition for each of the values.

I want to create a conditional alert but not able to add code successfully to extract measure values like described above. I have only one measure in the table.

 

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Maintenance of Business Partner Collections Master Data - Role UDM000 in BP model in MDG
entry.content: Hi Saravanan, I have requirement to add UDM000 - Collections Management, UKM000 - SAP Credit Management during the creation of BPs. As soon as I add the BP Role I see the roles getting adding added but I don't see a provision to pass values to the 'Credit Profile' tab. Do you have any documentation/reference how to achieve this? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Get Ready for the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product Expert Training 2025!
entry.content:
The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product Expert Training is a biannual multi-day event designed by the Cloud ERP Product Success organization to empower partners with in-depth knowledge of the latest features and AI-driven innovations–A must-attend for partners to drive customer success.

From March 24 to April 2, SAP partners and colleagues can look forward to 80+ sessions covering strategy and industry insights, selected end-to-end processes, and cross topics. Join the training to maximize customer success and stay ahead of the rapidly evolving digital landscape. Plus, you'll have the chance to ask your questions and get answers straight from the experts.

This training is your gateway to becoming a key resource for both your internal teams and your valued customers. Take this opportunity to delve into product features, tackle inquiries, and solve complex issues, all while gaining essential skills. This isn't just about gaining knowledge; it's about building relationships and learning from others on the same path. By asking questions, discussing real-world scenarios, and engaging with the experts, you'll enhance not only your own growth but also contribute to your team's success.

We're looking forward to 1,5 weeks of shared experiences and knowledge. See you at the training! 🤩

 

Save the date and stay tuned for the detailed agenda and registration on our landing page!

 

_________

Sign-Up Instructions:

An active SAP Learning Hub license is required to register for the live sessions and to consume the recordings. Find out how to sign up

As a Partner:
Partners with a valid SAP Universal ID, who are able to login to the Empowering SAP partners site, will be able to access the live sessions and recordings.

As an SAP Internal:
Register here for the SAP Learning Hub Internal Edition (free of charge) by clicking on “access”.

Experiencing issues? Make sure to be logged on before trying to register. In case of any other issues, reach out to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product Expert Training.

Don’t hesitate to leave a comment and check out our community page to ask your questions and engage with the experts. Follow the PSCC_Enablement tag to stay up to date with our latest blog posts. 

 

🔎 Find Our Assets 
GROW with SAP is a comprehensive package designed to help businesses of all sizes to successfully adopt cloud ERP, anchored by SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for optimized processes and intelligent, sustainable operations. We at Cloud ERP Product Success and Cloud Co-Innovation offer a service as versatile as our product itself. Check out the numerous offerings our team of experts has created for you below:

entry.title: Why choose SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace – Tailor Your Tracking Process (7 of 7)
entry.content:
Q: When is the end of the road not really the end of the road?

A: When you have someplace else to go.

In the final installment of this series, inspired by "Why choose SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace over individual visibility platforms," we'll delve into a seventh key aspect of SAP’s track and trace solution: "Tailor Your Tracking Process."

SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace is best known for:

  • Inbound and outbound real-time shipment tracking
  • Synchronizing multiple tracking data sources, direct from carriers or freight forwarders, or through any 3rd party network
  • Impact analysis, with configurable alerts and notifications, in the context of core business process tracking for Purchase, Sales, and Stock Transfer order fulfillment

But did you know SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace:

  • Is highly configurable down to the field level for unique process requirements
  • Has native tools to customize templates or model any process from scratch
  • Can leverage the benefits of the full solution for any process, such as openness to any data source and ability to apply configurable rules for actions, alerts and notifications

SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace is designed and delivered with the flexibility to adapt to practically any of the unique needs of any process in any industry.  You can leverage native tools to model and track any process to benefit from the multiple facets of the solution previously described in this series. 

Reason #7: Tailor Your Tracking Process

No two manufacturing or distribution companies are exactly alike.  Each has its own unique processes, standards, and priorities, which are essential to their brand’s competitive edge.  A one-size-fits-all approach to tracking simply won’t suffice in today’s mode of continuous innovation.  Failing to capture critical nuances and specific data points essential to a proprietary process will undermine such key elements for process tracking as measurement accuracy and proactive responsiveness.  But then again, swing too far into a tracking solution outside of your core landscape and the risks and costs of integration can sink any benefit from an external system.  

SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace meets the need for configuration and customization while maintaining SAP landscape and open data-source integration. SAP’s solution provides a range of flexible configuration options, allowing manufacturers and distributors to tailor their process tracking to their specific requirements. This includes the ability to:

  • Define custom fields and statuses: You can capture specific data points relevant to your industry, product, or process, such as temperature sensitivity or batch numbers, through extensibility with other apps and data sources.
  • Create custom event types and alerts: You can configure alerts to be triggered based on specific events or statuses, such as a process reaching an event milestone or exceeding a predefined threshold.
  • Develop custom process flows: You can model your proprietary process, and define automated actions to be triggered based on specific events, such as automated process re-routing or initiation of a quality control check. 

For example, a manufacturer specializing in high-value, temperature-sensitive pharmaceuticals can configure the solution to track temperature readings throughout packaging, storage, and distribution. Or in the case of global sensor technology leader SICK AG, the solution provides real-time production tracking visibility for greater efficiency, cost savings, and process automation.  In these and many more cases, manufacturers can set up alerts to notify stakeholders if an event or status deviates from an expected tolerance.  And to go one step further, custom process tracking can leverage standard event-to-action capability to automatically initiate actions such as a quality control check or re-routing if needed for optimal responsiveness.

The ability to tailor process tracking is essential to any competitor in any industry where your process is essential to you brand.  SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace provides the flexibility and customization needed to leverage a tracking solution that aligns with your processes, standards, and priorities.  Whether leveraging out-out-the-box templates or embracing a required level of customization, you can gain a deeper understanding of your business and your supply chain, make faster, more informed decisions, and ensure the safe and timely delivery of your products to your customers, with real-time, interactive process tracking.  The take-away on this topic: Effective process management is not about simply tracking the process; it's about leveraging process insights to drive cost savings, operational excellence, customer satisfaction, and growth. 

Wait, one more point.  SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace is SAP’s strategic solution for process tracking, offering a cloud solution that not only provides native integration with SAP Transportation Management, but also is the strategic successor to SAP Event Management.  Please reach your SAP representative to learn more about how the capabilities from SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace can replace your SAP Event Management installation.  

Okay, this marks the end of our series on "Why choose SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace over individual visibility platforms."  Thank you to all who have been with this since the first post, or have picked up the journey along the way.  

As from the opening of this post, this is not the end of the road.  Here are even more ways to learn about SAP’s supply chain logistics solutions, logistics visibility in general, and SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace in particular. 

  • Webinar: Transforming Logistics with Next-Generation Carrier Collaboration at Celsa
  • Inbound Logistics magazine: 10 Tips to Effective Logistics Visibility
  • Product Tour: SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace
  • Coming soon: Supply Chain Logistics Capability Maturity Model for self-assessment and planning

I hope you found this series helpful.  Please feel free to connect with me on LinkedIn.  And can I field any questions you may have here right from here too.

Thank you,
     Doug

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Melbourne - 21th May 2025
entry.content: Hi @Saikrishna_Sriram we would be interesting to host the event at 7-Eleven corporate office. Is the next event confirmed to be on Wednesday, 21 May, and to be hosted by AWS? Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Facing issue with BTP CI/CD Pipeline Initialization
entry.content: In Case you are still looking for answer. I faced the same issue with my private repo. The trick is to create a credential with your GIT HUB User Name, Basic Authentication and use PAT as password (Personal Access Token)

entry.title: Re: Method to Disable the "Access Recent Search" Feature...
entry.content: It helps me a lot, thanks!

entry.title: Counting scenario with RF in EWM
entry.content:
Hello Experts, I have a question for you.

The Project I am working on requires that we use the RF devices to count the products during the confirmation of a Task (either putaway, or picking). The scenario is the operator scans a material label and depending of the EAN "adds" the quantity". So if the operator scans two labels equivalent to 10 Pcs, the total count for the Task will be 20 pcs. On a extreme case, the operator has to scan 100 labes (with an EAN for 1 pc) to confirm a task for 100 Units. I am not sure this is an standard practice nor it is feasible with EWM. If you can share your opinion and if this can be achieved maybe with some development.

Thanks in advance.

Regards

entry.title: Re: The “onAfterDataEntryProcess” event in SAP Analytics Cloud Optimized Story
entry.content:
Hi @shady_shen , there is no easy way to revert the change for now as there is no revert version API yet.  You can use setUserInput API to set the old value to revert the change, while it might be some work to get filters from all filters applied to the table to concatenate the full context of data cell. 

I would suggest it more for data checks without changing data.

Sarau

entry.title: Re: Automatically creating a suboperation or another operation when an operation is added in SAP PM
entry.content: So it sounds like you know what Operations are going to create the Sub Operation or another Operation so why not create Task Lists to build the Operations & Sub Operation then assign the to the Work Order?

entry.title: Re: Priority in MB26
entry.content:
I believe you need to run transaction COGI to clear the nil stock error after or before MB26 is run. Here is a description on what COGI does.

COGI is used to check and clear error records that occur during backflushing or automatic goods receipt in production orders. When automatic goods issue or receipt is used, failed goods movements will be captured in error records that can be viewed and reprocessed using COGI.

entry.title: Re: Review Booklet Designer (Concept and Adaptability) - CE2408
entry.content:
Hi Stefan,

Great blog!

What is the status of booklet in Manage KPIs and Reports? The status of predefined booklet, "Cost Center Review Booklet(Booklet ID: SAP_FIN_CO_RB_COST_CENTER)" is "Application Outdated". Is this booklet no longer valid? Is it possible to copy it and create a custom booklet by customer? Technically, we can copy it and create a custom booklet but is it OK?

 

 

I would like to know the supportability of outdated booklet.

Best regards, Takuhito

entry.title: Value in "Is Contingent Worker of" for worker type BBP005 in Manage Workforce app
entry.content:
When trying to create USER ID in Manage Workforce app, what kind of value should be entered to the field "Is Contingent Worker of" if the worker type is BBP005.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Value in "Is Contingent Worker of" for worker type BB...
entry.content: In the field "Is Contingent Worker Of", enter Supplier of the Contingent Worker role (BBP005). For the tips regarding the fields, you may also check How to Fill In Downloaded Templates.

entry.title: Re: How to redeem a campaign code to get a free SAP Certification exam attempt and schedule your exa
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano,

I hope this email finds you well. My name is Dang Hai NGUYEN, and I am currently working as a .NET Developer at Lotte Innovate Vietnam. I am writing to express my interest in obtaining a free voucher for the SAP Certified Associate - SAP Business One C_TB120 certification exam.

As a dedicated professional in the SAP ecosystem, I believe that obtaining this certification would significantly enhance my skills and contribute to changing my career - path from a developer to a consultant. However, due to financial constraints, I find the exam fee to be challenging. I have not received any free attempt voucher before.

I have thoroughly prepared for the C_TB120 exam and am eager to demonstrate my competence in SAP technologies. I kindly request your assistance in providing me with a free voucher for this certification.

I have completed the learning journey of Explore SAP Business One, Web Client.

I have already registered with my email: dangnh@lotte.vn

Thank you for considering my request. I look forward to your positive response.

Thanks and Best regards,

LOTTE INNOVATE VIETNAM – HANOI BRANCH

NGUYEN HAI DANG
Developer | ERP TFT

Add: 31st floor, West Tower, Lotte Center Hanoi, 54 Lieu Giai, Cong Vi, Ba Dinh, Hanoi

Phone: (+84) 902159489   Email: dangnh@lotte.vn

entry.title: Is it possible that qRFC with destination NONE stuck in SMQ1?
entry.content: Hi all, The stuck queues I've seen are all in SMQ2, is it possible that stuck happened in SMQ1? If it is possible, could you please give an example？ Regards, Eric

entry.title: Re: How to prevent Excel from deleting leading zeros
entry.content:
Just use below code, it will export excel as char type and keep the leading zero 🙂

go_worksheet->set_cell( ip_column = p_col ip_row = p_row ip_value = p_value ip_style = font_content ip_abap_type = 'C' ) .

entry.title: Re: How can I set the Matrix Relationship Section in Posi...
entry.content:
Hi,

Even though * is marked in the matrix relationship section, as long as the association is not required, there should not be any error when creating a new position with empty matrix relationship, did you encounter any error during creation?

Best regards,

Elsa

entry.title: Re: Insufficient privileges to perform this action. - SAP Build Process Automation

This resolution helped me too.

entry.title: Re: How to make an infinity scrolling in macros table?
entry.content: We also use macros table for the list page which we put the macros table in <f:content> tag of <f:DynamicPage> and it can scrolling to load (I also try to put my dialog table in <f:DynamicPage> like that but still not have the endless scrolling). I using UI5 v1.126.2

entry.title: Re: How to fix OOMKilled restart issue with SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
Indeed the problem has been escalated to Product team and they're evaluating various solutions to fix the problem. Using malloc alternative is part of the discussion.

This being said changing malloc arena size seems easy to rollout globally with limited drawback.

entry.title: Re: Attach Iflow to one worker node
entry.content: The best way to avoid parallel processing is to use Exclusive queue / topic endpoint on the JMS broker (provider). With that set, you will have a guaranteed single processor with other nodes acting standby in a fault tolerant mode.

entry.title: Re: How to fix OOMKilled restart issue with SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Yannick,

Glad to know that Product team is following up, thanks for the update.

In the mean time we will try to tune down the malloc arena first. Please update us again if SAP comes up with permanent fix.

Thanks,

Duc.

entry.title: Re: Balance Sheet/Income Statement Custom S4HC ?
entry.content:
Dear,

The standard Fiori app cannot be modified. You could explore the possibility of embedded analytics to meet the reporting requirements. Custom analytical query + Manage KPI and Reports approach, use I_GLAccountLineItemSemTag as datasouce.

entry.title: Re: 在启用高级评估之后，计提坏账准备时，需要勾选客户主数据中的信用参数文件的风险类，导致必须启用信用额度；不勾...

entry.title: Cannot go back to a previous period in Close peridod app?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

I understand that in SAP Public Cloud, it is not possible to go back to a previous period in the Close Period app. Could you please confirm if this is correct?

If I still need to reopen the previous period, what steps should I take? Are there any workarounds or alternative solutions available?

Looking forward to your guidance.

Best regards,

entry.title: SAP CPQ integration with Cloud Identity Service - Conflict on Documentation
entry.content:
Need clarification on the documentation found here:

Integrate SAP CPQ and Identity Provisioning Service (Example Scenario) | SAP Help Portal

In this help document it is mentioned that in Cloud Identity Service we create user Groups based on CPQ Permission groups.

 

In the SCIM API documentation for CPQ that can be found here:

SCIM API | SAP Help Portal

the Mapping of groups is based on CPQ User Types and not on permission groups and using the SCIM connector we get User type + a suffix of '-USERTYPE'.

 

Questions:

  1. If I am to setup a transformation where SAP CPQ as source, will I get groups created in Cloud Identity Service based on User Types or based on Permission Groups?
  2. Will I also also be getting the permission groups as groups in Cloud Identity Service?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ integration with Cloud Identity Service - Con...
entry.content:
Answers:

  1. When setting up a transformation with SAP CPQ as the source, groups in Cloud Identity Service will be created based on User Types and not directly on Permission Groups. This is because the SCIM connector maps users to groups using their User Type + "-USERTYPE" suffix​.

  2. Yes, permission groups will also appear as groups in Cloud Identity Service, but separately from the user-type-based groups. The documents mention that other groups (besides the "-USERTYPE" groups) are permission groups, and they are also referenced by their system IDs​.

So, Cloud Identity Service will contain both:

  • Groups based on User Types (with the "-USERTYPE" suffix).
  • Groups representing Permission Groups, which are mapped separately.

entry.title: How can I add eventDelegate to a DatePicker control inside a fragment in a Dialog?
entry.content:
I have a Datepicker with id="lowDatePicker" inside a fragment in a dialog
In the controller, I am setting:

public onInit(): void {
const dateLowControl = this.byId("lowDatePicker");
if (dateLowControl) {
dateLowControl.addEventDelegate({
onAfterRendering: function (oEvent) {
console.log($("#" + dateLowControl.getId() + "-inner"));
$("#" + oEvent.srcControl.getId() + "-inner").prop("readonly", true);
},
});
}

But I am not getting the datePicker element. How to correctly add the eventDelegate in this case?

entry.title: CI DS Task in INSERT_UPDATE doesn't update values
entry.content:
We run CI DS Task to load open sales order data from file to IBP. Data is at SKU/Ship-to/Tech week level. We are seeing the behavior that if sales order for a given SKU/Ship to combination moves from one tech week to another, data gets loaded correctly in IBP but old data doesn't get deleted. This causes mismatch in data volume in IBP. 

Based on SAP Help - it looks like this behavior may be correct. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_INTEGRATED_BUSINESS_PLANNING/eab8fd1726934516a89eabced318b210/9cea9166178d49d2a05be529f377f959.html

Wanted to get feedback if anyone faced similar scenario before and running task using $G_BATCH_COMMAND 'REPLACE' is only alternative here? 

Thanks for inputs.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP GRC 12.0 - Emergency Access Management (EAM) for HANA Target Systems (using Web IDE)
entry.content:
Hi @madhusap,

Our client does not use Web IDE but use Cockpit to manage HANA DB's. Is there option to perform Firefighter in HANA DB's through HANA Cockpit? I tried configuring it, but it is not accepting the passwords generated by GRC while login into DB's from cockpit.

Thanks

Arpit

SAP GRC Firefighter for SAP NetWeaver

entry.title: Re: BADI not found in Delivery note item level
entry.content: Hi Jeery, Thanks for your update. My doubt, was when am doing custom logic tracing, I can see the badi that i have implemented in header lavel is getting trigger, but I dont see item lavel BADI in custom logic tracing.

entry.title: Re: BADI not found in Delivery note item level
entry.content: + I have implemented the below BADI 1)LE_SHP_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE 2)LE_SHP_MODIFY_HEAD 3)LE_SHP_MODIFY_ITEM The process am following while doing custom tracing are - 1) open display outbound delivery 2) giving outbound number -> execute 3) switching to display->change 4) menu->extra->output delivery ->output control -> adding my custom form 5) display Then when am checking in custom logic tracing, i Can see only "LE_SHP_MODIFY_HEAD" is triggered. Why other two BADI are not getting triggered. That is my question. Regards, Jagadhatri

I tested and found that whether it is checked or not, it will still print the output. I don't understand much about this function.

Thanks and Regards

But I can view them in company code, personal area, and sub-area, etc. When I try to search for the company name in Simple Maintenance, it's showing "not found." I checked the filter as well but don't know why. Can you please help me?

entry.title: SAP HCM payroll module.
entry.content: Dear Experts,I'm a beginner in SAP HCM and need help. Currently, I'm preparing for the SAP HCM payroll module. If you could help me by providing a Sheet Learning PDF for Payroll, it would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Case reporter/owner to be changed to myself
entry.content:
Customer would like to know if it's possible to change the reporter or owner for an incident created.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Case reporter/owner to be changed to myself
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Please kindly follow the KBA2403394 - How to change support case details - SAP for Me - SAP for Me.

Once a support case has been submitted to SAP it is not possible to change the S-user ID (reporter), but additional contacts (S-users) can be added according to KBA 2213199.

However, if the S-user that created a case is to be deleted and a new S-user ID taking over the case, the new S-user ID must log a new case and indicate it is a continuation of previous case number.

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: MS Dynamics to SAP BW Integration
entry.content:
Hi All,

we need your suggestions and insights. we are planning to move from ECC 6.0 (on HANA DB) to MS Dynamics. Currently, the ECC system is connected to a BW 7.5 on HANA system.

If transitions from ECC to MS Dynamics, what challenges or possibilities might arise in the target BW system?

And what are the BW versions will support and how to setup connection between those systems (MS Dynamics to SAP BW.

Thanks & Regards

Dhananjaya Naidu

entry.title: Re: CI DS Task in INSERT_UPDATE doesn't update values
entry.content: I'm afraid this is by-design. If you want the old data get deleted, need to use 'REPLACE' instead of 'INSERT_UPDATE'

entry.title: Re: How can I add eventDelegate to a DatePicker control i...

depends on the scenario, you have to use different method to get the control

check the documentation

https://ui5.sap.com/#/topic/5da591c5a5a54740948acfe56b22fbc3

entry.title: Build APP build Issue
entry.content:
Please help.
I am facing an issue while building Android App (Client run time version - 4.12.192). The error message is as follows:
AB version: 3.11.0
COMMAND: 

USER_METERING_ENABLED=true SHOW_SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION=false SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION_DISMISSIBLE=true NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16000 --no-experimental-global-navigator  npxrnv repackage-android -p android -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn --offline --templates-path /orchestra-cache/4.12.192/ejected_templates 

FAILED with ERROR: 

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv repackage-android -p android -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --packageManager yarn --offline --templates-path /orchestra-cache/4.12.192/ejected_templates

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM awarness sessions 2025 - What is in it & upcoming schedule

Thanks for the event, Could you please share the to the recording from 21.02.2025 and the slides.

Regards

Ömer

entry.title: possibility to have 4th custom code for account assignment
entry.content:
Hi Team

Due to the reporting requirement, my client is seeking possibility to have another custom code to be used for account assignment. Currently the client has consumed all 3 custom fields. We wonder if it is possible to have 4th custom code.

If it is not possible, then please advise if there is other options available such as leveraging existing data fields to be used for various business transactions including journal entry postings.

Look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards
PERSON_NAME


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: possibility to have 4th custom code for account assig...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

In SAP Business ByDesign, the standard configuration allows for up to three custom fields (custom codes) for account assignment. If all three custom fields are already utilized, adding a fourth custom field is not possible within the standard system capabilities.

Regards

entry.title: Re: BW cockpit is not working
entry.content: Thanks for response, we have followed all the above step, still issue is prsists.

entry.title: Re: SAP CHOTA TALKS Hyderabad 2025 (Q1) - Event Highlights
entry.content:
I had a fantastic experience at the SAP CHOTA TALKS in Hyderabad, 2025! It’s always insightful to attend events that dive deep into emerging tech like AI, especially with such knowledgeable speakers and a great team behind it.
"SAP CHOTA TALKS BHADA TALKS Hua Hai"
Looking forward to the next "SAP BHADA TALKS in Q2 2025" sounds like it’ll be another exciting opportunity to learn and engage!

Thank you, speakers, Mahesh / Gupta Kandula / Raghu / Immanuel / Ruthvik / Swapna / Dileep Kumar.

entry.title: how to build a live connection from SAC to S4HANA On Prem using Cloud Connector?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
 my team has been trying to build a live connection from SAC to S4HANA using cloud connector. We have installed and configured the cloud connector in BTP. We have also installed cloud connector on our S4HANA. But everytime while building a live connection in SAC in the Connections section we keep getting the error : "We couldn't connect to your S/4 HANA system. Possible causes: The SSL certificate is not trusted, or a network error occurred. For more information, see our troubleshooting page.
Correlation ID: 23075871-0937-4657-8611-230123129568"


Can someone please help us to solve this particular error?

entry.title: Production Order Operation - CDS View for Standard Machine and Labor Hours
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

From which CDS View can I get Standard Machine and Standard Labor hours of Production order.

 

I found the values are in Production Order - Operation Details. Kindly help in getting the CDS View.

Thanks in advance.

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Re: Apple pencil on Process Manager
External Users and approvals
entry.content:
Hello all,

When we create an item with approval and offer it to both external and internal users, how do we make the system skip the approval for the external users? One way is to duplicate the item in 2 libraries - one with approval and one without - but that is way too much admin work. Another way is to assign a dummy manager but that too comes with cost. Has anyone found another way for this kind of situation or has a suggestion please?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Apple pencil on Process Manager
entry.content: Can you please take it over and talk with your colleages. Many thanks and regards Nico

entry.title: Re: FioriElements - Grouping of table rows
entry.content:
Focusing on the CDS annotations:

- make sure to include a `visualizations` setting in your presentationvariant

- make sure to include the presentationvariant reference in the object page facet where it adds the table to the screen.

entry.title: Re: OLE - Creating header and footer in Word document using abap
entry.content:
Hi

I am writing a word doc using ole and code keeps going on all pages. 
How can i add a header to all the pages at once using this?

Can you please help on that?

entry.title: Re: A Beginner's Journey to Cloud Computing: SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry and Kyma Demystified.
entry.content: Great article, could you as well share the series of blogs which you mention here

entry.title: Re: Calculate Salary % in Advance Formulas Step in DataAc...
entry.content: I'm not sue how your data looks like, I assume you maybe don't the FOREACH loop. You may instead add a check if the month is the last month of the employee and calculate the ratio(even without the variable).

entry.title: Re: Counting scenario with RF in EWM
entry.content:
Hi @Miguel_Nava ,

" if this can be achieved maybe with some development." -> This is very much Possible and can achieved.

My Opinion:

My understanding is EAN is SKU even if different EAN for Same Product based on SKUs/Selling item.

Design level-> You need to create individual warehouse tasks (Warehouse Order *EWM Technical Terms) for each scanning EAN. As per your example: "So if the operator scans two labels equivalent to 10 Pcs, the total count for the Task will be 20 pcs" -> Two Labels=> 2 SKUs => 2 Warehouse Tasks 

"On a extreme case, the operator has to scan 100 labes (with an EAN for 1 pc) to confirm a task for 100 Units."-> 100 Labels => 100 SKUs => 100 Warehouse Tasks 

"the total count for the Task will be 20 pcs" => You can add extra fields to visible as Total identify as unit quantity Example 10 Pcs=> Scan => 10 Pcs=> Scan Total =20.  1PC => Scan => 1 PC=> Scan....up to 100 Scans => Total = 100

You can restrict the  quantity manipulation on user screen. Example user can not change the quantity if it is EAN/SKU/Label.

Certainly some development is required in this case. 

Please let us know if further questions.

Kind regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: Input control unexpected behavior SAC
entry.content: Maybe try to check of cascading on the input controls?

entry.title: eInvoice details on Invoice form
entry.content:
Hello Team,

The business requirement is to send invoice forms with eInvoice details like IRN number and QR code as soon as billing document is created through an email to a customer. 

Once the invoice document, billing output changes its status to complete instantly. If eInvoice is not triggered for it, eInvoice details are missing from billing form.

Can you please let me know how to achieve this where as soon as billing document is created, email will be triggered to customer with eInvoice details without any delay and manual intervention.

Regards,

Ajit
